tasks.description: Build a list of strong holdings to keep and weak tickers to replace based on analytics.

subtasks.description: Synthesize strengths/weaknesses from prior analysis to define keep, resize, and remove lists.

completion_evidence:
Systematic review of analytics identifies tickers with strong sustained risk-adjusted return, resilience in stress scenarios, and/or balance sheet and quality strength as 'keep/resize'; those with poor risk-adjusted return (low or negative Sharpe, alpha, or persistent high drawdown/volatility) and/or consistently high loss in stress scenarios as 'remove/resize'.

Keep/Overweight: NVDA, APP, AVGO, PLTR, BSX, NRG, GREK, SGDM, SLVR, JPM, EQIX, VCSH, IGSB.
Resize/Watchlist: ARM, MTSI, MU, CEG, CMS, FUFU, FR, TRNO, STAG, OKLO, NLR, INTR, NU, WEC, EIS, EMQQ, FITB, IIPR, CRDO, EXOD, DGNX.
Remove/Replace: DGNX, CRDO, FR, IIPR, TRNO, STAG, OKLO, NLR, FUFU (due to persistently poor risk-adjusted returns, high drawdowns, high stress test losses, low news/analyst support, or very high correlation clusters).
observations: Tool 'update_task_status' returned: {'success': True, 'task_id': '4a', 'status': 'in_progress'}
Tool 'add_task_evidence' returned: True
